revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月十一]][[zh:正月十一]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 11|qq=January 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}} the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Emperor Chūai|en|Emperor Chūai|qid=Q179971|lt=Chūai|1=Emperor Chūai}} (Julian calendar {{ill|February 11|en|February 11|qid=Q2335|lt=February 11|1=February 11}} , {{ill|192|en|192|qid=Q30336|lt=192|1=192}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūai|en|Emperor Chūai|qid=Q179971|lt=Emperor Chūai|1=Emperor Chūai}} , the 14th emperor of Japan, ascends to the throne. * Year 1 of {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|qid=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|February 7|en|February 7|qid=Q2322|lt=February 7|1=February 7}} , {{ill|708|en|708|qid=Q23511|lt=708|1=708}} ) – Copper is presented from {{ill|Chichibu District, Saitama|en|Chichibu District, Saitama|qid=Q1145581|lt=Chichibu District, Saitama|1=Chichibu District, Saitama}} , {{ill|Musashi Province|en|Musashi Province|qid=Q907398|lt=Musashi Province|1=Musashi Province}} , leading to the era change from {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|qid=Q428753|lt=Keiun|1=Keiun}} to Wadō. * Year 1 of {{ill|Tengi|en|Tengi|qid=Q1193591|lt=Tenki|1=Tengi}} (Julian calendar {{ill|February 2|en|February 2|qid=Q2313|lt=February 2|1=February 2}} , {{ill|1053|en|1053|qid=Q19368|lt=1053|1=1053}} ) – Era change from {{ill|Eishō (Heian period)|en|Eishō (Heian period)|qid=Q1193549|lt=Eishō (Heian period)|1=Eishō (Heian period)}} to Tenki. * Year 1 of {{ill|Genryaku|ja|Genryaku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genryaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|February 24|en|February 24|qid=Q2355|lt=February 24|1=February 24}} , {{ill|1184|en|1184|qid=Q19728|lt=1184|1=1184}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is appointed {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Seii Taishogun|1=Shogun}} . * Year 12 of {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|January 27|en|January 27|qid=Q2284|lt=January 27|1=January 27}} , {{ill|1569|en|1569|qid=Q6653|lt=1569|1=1569}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kenshin|en|Uesugi Kenshin|qid=Q311080|lt=Uesugi Kenshin|1=Uesugi Kenshin}} sends salt to [[Takeda Shingen]]{{efn|Japanese feudal lord (1521–1573)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda Shingen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , despite being at war, inspiring the phrase "sending salt to the enemy." * Year 4 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} / Year 1 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|February 4|en|February 4|qid=Q2318|lt=February 4|1=February 4}} , {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} ) – The {{ill|Kobe Incident|en|Kobe Incident|qid=Q11589796|lt=Kobe Incident|1=Kobe Incident}} occurs when {{ill|Bizen Domain|ja|備前藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bizen Domain|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岡山藩|1=Okayama Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q903497}} soldiers fire upon a foreign diplomatic delegation, marking the Meiji government's first international dispute.
== Births == * Year 21 of {{ill|Engi (era)|en|Engi (era)|qid=Q1374325|lt=Engi|1=Engi (era)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|February 21|en|February 21|qid=Q2350|lt=February 21|1=February 21}} , {{ill|921|en|921|qid=Q30102|lt=921|1=921}} ) – {{ill|Abe no Seimei|en|Abe no Seimei|qid=Q1150151|lt=Abe no Seimei|1=Abe no Seimei}} , {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|qid=Q2274163|lt=Onmyōji|1=Onmyōji}} (d. {{ill|1005|en|1005|qid=Q19231|lt=1005|1=1005}} ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Enkyō (Edo period)|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Edo period)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1183728}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|February 11|en|February 11|qid=Q2335|lt=February 11|1=February 11}} , {{ill|1745|en|1745|qid=Q7586|lt=1745|1=1745}} ) – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|ja|Ino Tadataka|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Tadataka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , surveyor and cartographer (d. {{ill|1818|en|1818|qid=Q6964|lt=1818|1=1818}} ).
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kagami biraki|en|Kagami biraki|qid=Q2030205|lt=Kagami Biraki|1=Kagami biraki}} * {{ill|Kura Biraki|ja|蔵開き|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kura Biraki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
== See Also ==
